completion_summary: Kept the source-corpus outcomes where they already matched the recovered reports and synthesized the missing validator-facing fields for the four note-only laws and six history-only laws in review-01.

laws.title: Public Law 1-1 | Enactment of the U.S. Codes Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: The enactment is current history-only legislation; the codification report places it as a statutory note.
laws.exact_enacted_change: Preserve the enactment as a concise statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 4103 and do not create operative text.

provisions.conclusion: The full act is note-only history at the 2 U.S.C. 4103 anchor.

current_implementation.detail: usc02.xml contains the 4103 anchor, but the visible note is a different codification note and not a concise PL-001-001 history entry.

laws.current_xml_comparison: usc02.xml already contains the 2 U.S.C. 4103 anchor, but the visible note there is not PL-001-001-specific. The branch still needs a trimmed history note at that location.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the law as a concise statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 4103 and remove dump-style text.

laws.title: Public Law 1-2 | United States Bar Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source corpus treats the measure as repealed, so no current Code text is authorized.
laws.exact_enacted_change: Keep only repeal history; do not insert current Code text.

provisions.conclusion: History-only treatment is sufficient for the entire act.

current_implementation.detail: No current Code insertion is authorized for this repealed law.

laws.current_xml_comparison: No current XML insertion is required; the law remains history-only.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep only repeal history and do not create operative text.

laws.title: Public Law 1-3 | Closing Cabinet Doors Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: The enactment is a current note-only law; the source report places it at 2 U.S.C. 658e.
laws.exact_enacted_change: Preserve the departments-closure and blanket-repeal language as a concise statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 658e.

provisions.conclusion: The closure and repeal language is note-only history at the 658e anchor.

current_implementation.detail: usc02.xml has the 658e anchor, but no PL-001-003-specific note was recovered in the current branch XML.

laws.current_xml_comparison: usc02.xml contains the 2 U.S.C. 658e anchor, but the current tree does not show a PL-001-003-specific note at that location.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep the enactment as a concise statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 658e and trim any dump-style material.
